title: alalazo #0214
definition:
1) to repeat frequently the cry "alala" as soldiers used to do on
    entering into battle
 2) to utter a joyful sound
 3) to wail, lament
 4) to ring loudly, to clang

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5804\\
